ddls:
CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "tconst" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_type" TEXT /* Type of title (e.g., movie, TV show) */,
  "primary_title" TEXT /* Primary title of the media content */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the media content was released */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the media content ended (for TV shows) */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the media content in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the media content */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the media content */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the media content */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the media content */,
  "production_budget" TEXT /* Production budget of the media content */,
  "box_office_revenue" TEXT /* Box office revenue of the media content */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the media content */,
  "awards_nominated" INTEGER /* Number of awards nominated for the media content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the director was born */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year the director died (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the writer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the writer was born */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year the writer died (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_directors" (
  "title_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title-director relationship */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "director_id" TEXT /* ID of the director */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_directors_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_writers" (
  "title_writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title-writer relationship */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "writer_id" TEXT /* ID of the writer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_writers_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_writers_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_genres" (
  "title_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title-genre relationship */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "genre_id" TEXT /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_genres_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the title */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted for the title */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_votes_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the title */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the title was viewed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_awards" (
  "title_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title-award relationship */,
  "tconst" TEXT /* ID of the media title */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Whether the title won the award */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_awards_tconst FOREIGN KEY ("tconst") REFERENCES titles ("tconst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_title_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)
